purpose: Use the same SO-101 hardware in a recreated or similar chess scene to validate retrospective interaction proxies and future simulator transfer without rewriting the retired workcell evidence.

same_workcell_requires_all: same control firmware calibration and joint mapping

static_identity: board dimensions identity and fiducial layout
camera identifiers modes intrinsics extrinsics and orientation
wide setup photographs and measured board-to-base transform
read_only_baseline: joint positions velocities and raw current at rest
board and object detections without motion

signals: fresh-read current with explicit read timestamp
synchronized overhead and side or depth frames
empty_gripper_baseline_after_motion_auth.purpose: Separate object-loaded closure from mechanical hard-stop and controller-load signatures.

required_new_observables: metric object keypoints or pose with uncertainty
promotion_gates: new source bytes are immutable and hash bound
train validation and held-out episodes are frozen before fitting
exact replay uses approved transforms and no clipping
event proxy is validated against independently annotated video or instrumentation
candidate simulator improves event-conditioned held-out fidelity
physical transfer is evaluated only in the new workcell under separate authority
